demographic_profile.summary: These are professionals working within organizations who identify gaps in current systems and propose solutions based on their daily operational experience. They are driven by the need to improve team productivity, meet compliance requirements, and streamline workflows for better organizational outcomes. Their frustrations center around tools that don't integrate well with existing systems, lack customization options, or don't scale to meet their specific organizational needs.
